_comment: Golden-vector fixture for DeepBook Predict binary digital option pricing. Captured live from testnet via devInspectTransactionBlock. Pin the off-chain pricing/IV-surface math against these BEFORE writing the indexer. All prices scaled 1e9; strikes/spot/forward scaled 1e9; SVI a/b/sigma scaled 1e9, rho/m are i64 sign-magnitude scaled 1e9.

svi._note: rho,m stored as i64{magnitude,is_negative}; shown signed here

invariants: for every K: up + down == 1000000000 (binary digital no-arb parity)
up(K) strictly non-increasing in K, clamped to [0, 1000000000]
T is derived from oracle stored timestamp (expiry - prices.timestamp), NOT clock-now; Clock arg is a staleness guard only -> fixture is reproducible from oracle_state alone
